summary: Manufacturing transactions integration in Quick Transactions page - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API returns 12 manufacturing transactions correctly. Frontend displays all 4 manufacturing transaction types (Material Issue, Labor Cost, Production, Scrap/Reject) with proper icons, colors, and labels. Manufacturing filter correctly filters only manufacturing transactions.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - pre-existing issue noted in previous iterations

quick_transactions_shows_manufacturing.details: All 12 manufacturing transactions visible in Quick Transactions page

manufacturing_filter_works.details: Manufacturing filter in dropdown correctly filters to show only 12 manufacturing-related transactions (mfg_material_issue, mfg_labor, mfg_production, mfg_scrap)

all_transactions_filter_works.details: Switching back to All Transactions shows 57 total transactions including manufacturing

sample_transactions: Materials issued for WO-202602-0003 - Classic Trouser (mfg_material_issue)

GET /api/simple-finance/all-transactions.details: Manufacturing transactions included in all transactions view

seed_data_creation: None - used existing manufacturing data from previous iterations (3 work orders: WO-202602-0001, WO-202602-0002, WO-202602-0003)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manufacturing financial integration working perfectly. Quick Transactions page shows all manufacturing journal entries (MFG-WO-* prefix). Manufacturing filter in dropdown filters correctly. All 4 transaction types have proper icons, colors, and labels. Test data includes 12 manufacturing transactions across 3 work orders.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real - fetches from /api/simple-finance/all-transactions endpoint
